subject: FW: Yoed Nir-solo Recital
body:
From: yoed nir [mailto:yoednir@gmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, May 28, 2008 3:01 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Yoed Nir-solo Recital

 


Dear Jeffrey ,

I am sending you a link for a concert i am giving this week its in long Island,

would love to see you if you could make it,

 

Best,

 

Yoed

 

ps

in any case i will write two tickets under my name for you to have

 


  


Cello Recital Celebrating Israel's 60th-Yoed Nir & Renana Gutman

May 29, 7:30pm @ Hewlett-Woodmere Public Library

Details


Yoed Nir,Cello & Renana Gutman,Piano
 Program
 J.S.BACH-suite no' 1 for cello solo
 R.SCHUMANN-fantasiestucke for violoncello and piano
 ERNEST BLOCH-Prayer "From Jewish Life",No 1
 YOED NIR-World of Cello, improvisation for Electric Cello solo
 J.BRAHMS-sonata for violoncello and piano in E minor op' 38

Free to residents of the Hewlett-Woodmere Library district. Hewlett-Woodmere Public Library - 1125 Address: Broadway, Hewlitt, NY. For more information please call:

email:yoednir@gmail.com <mailto:email%3Ayoednir@gmail.com>  <mailto:yoednir@gmail.com>
 visit:www.nassaulibrary.org <http://www.nassaulibrary.org/>  <http://www.nassaulibrary.org/hewlett/> .

close

 

PS

this is a link for the concert in the Israeli Consulate website:

 http://www.israelfm.org/culture/ <http://www.israelfm.org/culture/>


 

 

 

 

Yoed Nir - Cellist

 1-917-349-5702

 Website: www.yoednir.com <http://www.yoednir.com/> 
 myspace:www.myspace.com/yoednir
